hero.title: Start Your Onboarding Journey
hero.description: Have questions about distribution, rights management, or YouTube channel growth? Reach out and our team will get back to you within 24–48 hours.

methods.heading: Direct Contact Methods
methods.description: Feel free to reach out to us using any of the communication channels listed below.

form.heading: Send a Message
form.description: Complete the form below and one of our catalog coordinators will schedule a consultation.

success.heading: Message Sent Successfully
success.message: Thank you for reaching out. One of our catalog coordinators will evaluate your details and respond within 24–48 hours.
